title: Add page metadata snapshot to weekly SEO review
summary: Records release evidence for the page metadata snapshot script, the live-HTML fixture test, and the weekly review runner update that now fills current title and meta description fields before generating the priority report.
completed_todo_items: Refresh underperforming pages with stronger titles, FAQs, comparison tables, and clearer search intent alignment.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the weekly SEO runner can snapshot current page titles and meta descriptions from live HTML before it generates the priority queue.

ops.rollback_plan: Delete the metadata snapshot script, related test coverage, and runner integration if the SEO review flow stops tracking live page titles and meta descriptions in the weekly tracker.
